sentences.english: I got completely lost in Venice because all the streets look the same.
But it was actually kind of fun.
sentences.korean: 모든 거리가 같아 보여서요. 하지만 사실 나름 재미있었어요.

sentences.english: I get lost even in my own city, because I have zero sense of direction.
sentences.korean: 내 도시에서도 길을 잃어요. 방향 감각이 전혀 없어서요.

sentences.english: Getting lost is the best way to discover new places, because that's how I found my favorite restaurant.
sentences.korean: 길을 잃는 게 새 장소를 발견하는 최고의 방법이에요. 그렇게 좋아하는 식당을 찾았거든요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
